title: Inspector and diagnostics UX
description: Implement selection and inspector surfaces for nodes, edges, zones, boundaries, data, permissions, and diagnostics; add diagnostics panel/external target rendering and configurable console diagnostics.
triage_notes: DONE (Codex): added src/inspector.ts with inspectModelElement(), inspectorHtml(), and renderInspector() for node/edge/zone/boundary/data/permission/identity/diagnostic selections. Node/edge/zone/boundary inspectors expose the v0.1 spec-listed fields, related diagnostics, related data/permissions/identities, and crossing edges where applicable. render(model,{inspectorTarget,selection}) and <archmap-viewer inspector inspector-target> now render inspector output; viewer clicks on SVG nodes/edges/zones/boundaries/permission overlay edges update the inspector and dispatch archmap:select-* events with stable model references. Diagnostics HTML now includes diagnostic index and target data attributes for focus/filter follow-up. Verified: npm run typecheck, npm test (96), npm run build, aof organization-verify (22/22). Residuals: visual highlight-on-select and click-from-external-diagnostics-to-diagram focus remain TASK-008 rendering-quality polish.
